title: podman-remote build --device : unhelpful error message
body:
Whether or not `--device` is meaningful in `podman-remote build`(*), this is not a helpful failure:
```console
$ echo "FROM scratch" | ./bin/podman-remote build --device /dev/fuse -
Error: failed to parse query parameter 'devices': "": unexpected end of JSON input
```

* My initial reaction was that it's not, but on reflection I think there might be use cases for it. I leave that decision to others.
